user.title: GARO Entity Balance
user.description: Enter the connection details for your GARO Entity Balance load balancer. Credentials are printed on a sticker on the physical device.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to read live meter values (power, current, voltage, energy). Default: 15 s. No benefit going below 5 s for a P1 port.
data_description.slow_scan_interval: How often to fetch data that rarely changes: temperatures, firmware version, network info. Must be greater than or equal to the fast interval. Default: 300 s.
data_description.ignore_tls_errors: Skip certificate validation. Safe to enable for local network devices with self-signed certificates.
data_description.use_http: Only use if the device does not support HTTPS.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the host address and network.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check username and password (password is case-sensitive, use lowercase).
error.slow_must_be_gte_fast: Slow poll interval must be greater than or equal to the fast poll interval.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

error.slow_must_be_gte_fast: Slow poll interval must be greater than or equal to the fast poll interval.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to read live meter values. Default: 15 s.
data_description.slow_scan_interval: How often to fetch diagnostic data (temperatures, firmware, network). Must be ≥ fast interval. Default: 300 s.
